_comment: Researcher sub-agent — spawned by orchestrator, runs steps s1+s2

input.query: Collect Q1 2025 financial data for Acme Corp and 3 main competitors

candidates.title: Acme Corp Q1 2025 Earnings
candidates.content_preview: Acme Corp Q1 revenue: $12M, +8% YoY, EBITDA margin 18%

candidates.title: Beta Corp Q1 2025 Financial Results
candidates.content_preview: Beta Corp Q1 revenue: $18M, +15% YoY, market leader in segment

candidates.title: Gamma Inc Q1 2025 Report
candidates.content_preview: Gamma Inc Q1 revenue: $9M, flat YoY

candidates.title: Delta Ltd Q1 2025 Investor Update
candidates.content_preview: Delta Ltd Q1 revenue: $7M, -3% YoY, restructuring underway

reasoning_steps.content: Received task from orchestrator: collect Q1 2025 data for Acme and competitors
Searching for Acme Corp Q1 2025 financial reports
Searching for top competitor Q1 2025 data
Extracting structured metrics from all 4 selected documents
Summarising findings for return to orchestrator

output.final_answer: Data collected. Acme Q1: $12M (+8%). Competitors: Beta $18M (+15%), Gamma $9M (flat), Delta $7M (-3%). Note: internal pricing doc was ACL-blocked and excluded.
